channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

- UK court upholds Britain's ban on Palestine Action group
- Rights groups condemn court-backed ban on Palestine Action
- What a UK court’s backing of the Palestine Action ‘terror’ ban means
- Britain court upholds ban on Palestine Action as terrorist group
- UK Court Upholds Terrorist Label for Palestine Action
- UK’s ban on Palestine Action under terror legislation was lawful, Court of Appeal says
- UK Court of Appeal rules Palestine Action ban to be lawful
- UK Court of Appeal upholds ban on Palestine Action as ‘terrorist’ group
- Britain wins appeal that Palestine Action ban was unlawful
- Palestine Action ban upheld by appeals court
- U.K. Ban on Pro-Palestinian Protest Group Is Lawful, Court of Appeal Rules
- U.K.’s Ban on Palestine Action Under Terror Legislation Was Lawful, Court of Appeal Rules

- UK court upholds ‘terrorist’ proscription of Palestine Action]]>

- Who was James Barker? The ‘Love Island USA’ executive producer, whose sudden death at 40 left fans heartbroken]]>

item.title: Iran will never have nuclear weapons, not today and not tomorrow: Netanyahu
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israel will not let Iran get nuclear weapons regardless of deal with US — Netanyahu]]>

item.title: Trump says ‘no sanctions relief’ for Iran in peace deal: ‘Starts taking effect if they...’

Matched Titles:

- Microsoft CEO warns that a few AI winners could destroy 'entire industries']]>

item.title: The US-Iran deal has bought time, but what remains to be achieved?
item.source: South China Morning Post (+1 other sources)
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Back to square one? A US-Iran ‘deal’ that resolves little and could make things worse]]>
